response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with broad polyglot background, but the role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum and substantial large-scale distributed/cloud infrastructure experience. The resume shows only brief early-career C/C++ work at National Instruments (~6 months) and a bachelor thesis project; recent work is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang focused with no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale.
strengths: Long engineering tenure with mentoring, workshops, and TDD/CI advocacy
Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps tooling
Some exposure to high-throughput systems (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby data integration)
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ minimum requirement
No demonstrated production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed systems leadership
No formal tech-lead title for cloud/DevOps teams; recent focus is product/AI tooling, not infra

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed systems depth
Breadth of engineering experience and mentoring
